title: Embed button click links in emails from Monday
excerpt: We have complex workflow with many manual stages that we can’t eradicate.  We are trying to simplify by providing volunteers with only the information they need to take the next step - rather than a long email that they …

posts.author: azaralady (Amanda M)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have complex workflow with many manual stages that we can’t eradicate. We are trying to simplify by providing volunteers with only the information they need to take the next step - rather than a long email that they then mis-read.

To do this we would like them to be able to click on a button in an email notification which will simulate clicking the button in the monday app. This would then advance the status to the next in the workflow and trigger the next set of actions, including the next email they need to read and action.

I can’t find a way to do this today, it would be a very helpful addition.

A

posts.author: amates (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: We would also like to see this done

posts.author: yishaimic (Yishai Michelson)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s very missing natively in Monday, but this feature exists in the Supermail app in monday marketplace
